source_reference: Python urllib.parse documentation warning about urljoin with attacker-controlled absolute URLs
title: Reject unsafe redirect targets
prompt: Fix normalize_redirect_target so relative paths are accepted but absolute URLs and scheme-relative URLs are rejected with ValueError. Preserve the public API.
hidden_tests_description: Absolute http URLs, scheme-relative URLs, whitespace, and path traversal-like inputs are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: The candidate rewards ordinary redirect safety and API preservation only.
h0_risk_notes: A strong non-system baseline with security discipline should be competitive.
